description_long: This is a red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a metallic handle and nozzle assembly at the top, featuring a pressure gauge and a safety pin. The body is adorned with multiple instructional and warning labels, including a prominent white label with usage instructions and pictograms on the front, and a larger yellow label with safety information on the back. A black hose is attached to the side, looping from the top nozzle down to a holder near the base. The extinguisher shows signs of wear, with some scuff marks and faded paint, suggesting it has been in service for some time. The pressure gauge is mounted at the top, and a tamper-evident seal is visible near the handle. The overall construction appears robust, primarily metal, with plastic and rubber components for the hose and handle grip.
description: A worn red metal fire extinguisher with a black hose, pressure gauge, safety pin, and multiple instructional labels on its body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main white instruction label, pressure gauge, safety pin, and the hose attached to the side.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the large yellow safety label and the hose running down the side.
description_view_2: Back view dominated by the yellow label, with the nozzle and hose clearly visible at the top.
description_view_3: Side view showing the hose's attachment points and a partial view of both the front and rear labels.
attribute_label_or_signage: Multiple labels are visible: a large white instruction label with text and pictograms on the front, and a large yellow safety/instruction label on the back. Both are rectangular and affixed to the cylindrical body.
attribute_mounting_bracket_or_holder: A black holder or strap is visible securing the hose to the side of the extinguisher body.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black rubber hose is attached at the top, looping down the side and secured by a holder; the metallic nozzle is at the top end of the hose.
attribute_pressure_gauge: A round pressure gauge is present at the top near the handle, with a metallic rim and colored markings.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A metallic safety pin with a ring and a tamper-evident seal is visible at the top near the handle.
